title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at DMart Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at DMart Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the DMart Advisory Limited family as a Store Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DMart Advisory Limited:
DMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart Advisory Limited!
